results.title: US lawmakers warn China expanding espionage, cyber operations targeting American states
results.description: Washington, July 17 (SocialNews.XYZ) US lawmakers and state security officials warned that China is increasingly using espionage, cyber intrusions, influence operations and economic leverage to target US states and critical infrastructure, telling a House Intelligence... results.title: Gill rues middle-order collapse after defeat
results.description: Cardiff: India captain Shubman Gill blamed his side’s middle-order collapse after England chased down a modest 234 with four wickets in hand in the second ODI here on Thursday to level the three-match series 1-1. Joe Root anchored the chase with a patient 99 not out as England chased down the target in 44.1 overs.... The post Gill rues middle-order collapse after defeat appeared first on OrangeNews9 .
